name: Performance - LLM Endpoint Latency
description: Evaluates the response time of the /api/assistant/llm endpoint under moderate concurrent usage.
input: Multiple concurrent POST requests to /api/assistant/llm with varied user_prompt payloads.
output: Latency distribution and error rate for LLM responses.
success_criteria: No more than 5% of requests fail
LLM fallback model is used if primary fails, with no user-facing errors
error_scenarios: LLM API rate limits or timeouts
